subject: URGENT: Cosentyx Q1 campaign — email open rates below threshold
body: Hi team, overnight CRM pull shows our Cosentyx Belgium email campaign dropped to 18% open rate — well below the 28% target. Three accounts in Ghent and Antwerp haven't engaged in 6 weeks. Need a revised channel plan before the team meeting at 10am. Also, regional MLR has flagged one asset for revision. Can we discuss?

subject: Entresto webinar — 94 registrations confirmed for Thursday
body: Great news: the Entresto heart failure webinar is at 94 registrations vs. a 75 target. We have 4 high-value cardiologists confirmed from Oslo and Stockholm. I'm attaching the latest slide deck for your review — one slide on the PARADIGM-HF data needs your sign-off before we can upload to the platform.

subject: [ACTION REQUIRED] MLR review cycle closes Friday 17:00 CET
body: Automated reminder: you have 2 assets currently in MLR review for Switzerland and Portugal. Deadline for feedback submission is Friday 17:00 CET. Assets pending: (1) Kisqali CH email — sent for review 5 days ago. (2) Cosentyx PT digital banner — 2 days in review. Please ensure local reviewers have responded.

subject: Dr. Keller (Bern, oncology) — requesting updated data on Kisqali combinations
body: Evening, Dr. Keller called just before close. She's treating a complex HR+/HER2- patient and wants the latest real-world data on Kisqali + letrozole. Can someone pull the RWE slides and the ESM0 2024 data pack? I have a follow-up call with her at 14:30 tomorrow. Would be great to have something by 13:00.

subject: Today's campaign deadlines — 3 actions due
body:
Good morning. Automated briefing for today:
1. [DUE TODAY] Entresto Netherlands email — final copy approval needed by 12:00
2. [DUE TODAY] Austria digital banner — translation review by 15:00
3. [DUE TOMORROW] Cosentyx Belgium revised channel plan submission

Campaign performance summary: 2 campaigns on track, 1 at risk (Belgium), 1 paused pending MLR.
